text: I was supposed to wake up at 5:30 AM for the gym, but hit snooze 5 times. Now I'm running late and feeling like a failure. This is what getting back on track really looks like.
decision_reason: meets the requirements for week 1, beginning phase

text: Most people post gym selfies after a good workout. But what about the days you don't want to go? I've been back at the gym for a week now, and it's been a struggle. My dreams are worth the sacrifice, even when it feels like nobody else is making an effort.

audience_fit.pain_point: feeling like nobody around them takes life seriously

decision_reason: meets the requirements for week 1, beginning phase
